Operation 'trackEvent' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity about what gets returned and the side effect that events become available for analytics. Added specificity about return value and persistence behavior to help AI agents understand the operation's full impact.

data.current_description: Records a custom event with optional user ID and metadata.
data.summary_suggestion: Record a custom event with metadata
data.description_suggestion: Records a custom event to the analytics platform. Accepts optional user ID and custom metadata fields for event enrichment. Returns a success confirmation. Events are persisted and immediately available for search and analytics queries.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description lacks clarity about what gets returned and the side effect that events become available for analytics. Added specificity about return value and persistence behavior to help AI agents understand the operation's full impact.

message: Operation 'searchEvents' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Added clarity about filter groups support and cursor-based iteration pattern to improve AI agent understanding of how to use this operation effectively.

data.current_description: Searches for events with filtering and cursor-based pagination. Returns 100 events per page.
data.summary_suggestion: Search and retrieve events with pagination
data.description_suggestion: Searches for events matching specified filter criteria using cursor-based pagination. Returns up to 100 events per page along with a cursor for retrieving the next page. Supports advanced filtering through filter groups. Use the returned cursor to iterate through result sets.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description mentions pagination but lacks detail about filter capabilities and how to use cursors. Added clarity about filter groups support and cursor-based iteration pattern to improve AI agent understanding of how to use this operation effectively.
